response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with broad full-stack experience and notable strengths in D-language low-latency systems and GIS platforms, which are tangentially relevant to geospatial routing tile work. However, the role explicitly requires modern C++ or Rust experience, and the resume shows only limited, dated C/C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2007-2008) and no Rust. Distributed-systems and navigation-guidance pipeline experience is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong geospatial background via GISCollective and Green Map web GIS work
Prior low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic with async I/O and fibers
Senior-level engineer with broad polyglot adaptability and DevOps/CI exposure
concerns: Modern C++ experience is minimal and ~17 years old; no evidence of Rust
No demonstrated work on production routing/navigation guidance pipelines or tile generation
Recent roles center on TypeScript/Node and AI tooling, not systems-level data pipelines
